title: Watch Arbitrage Tracker — Output
description: Cross-platform arbitrage opportunities + market snapshot + raw listings collected across 13 marketplaces (Chrono24, WatchBox/The 1916 Company, Bobs, Watchfinder UK, European Watch, Watches of Switzerland, Watch Club, H. Spliedt, A Collected Man, Analog:Shift, Bachmann & Scher, Yahoo Auctions Japan, plus Hodinkee slot).

arbitrageOpportunities.title: 🚨 Arbitrage opportunities
arbitrageOpportunities.description: Cross-platform spread alerts. Each entry = one listing priced below the cross-platform median for its reference. Sorted by spread % descending (biggest opportunities first). Use this to spot flips fast.

marketSnapshot.title: 📊 Market snapshot per reference
marketSnapshot.description: Per-reference statistics: median, min, max, listings count, platforms covered. Use this to understand cross-platform pricing baseline before drilling into individual listings.

crossCountrySpreads.title: 🌍 Cross-country spreads
crossCountrySpreads.description: Country-pair spread candidates such as JP ↔ US or EU ↔ US. Useful for dealers sourcing globally and comparing landed-cost routes.

runEconomics.title: 💰 Run economics
runEconomics.description: Estimated gross revenue, net after Apify margin, usage cost, and guard decision for the actual run shape. Use this to keep scheduled monitors profitable.

datasetItems.title: 💎 All listings (full dataset)
datasetItems.description: Every individual listing collected across the selected marketplaces. Browse, filter, sort by price, condition, year, box and papers. Export as JSON, CSV, Excel, or HTML.
